intro: Sunlight spills over a wide, flower-strewn meadow. It is the perfect spot to stop, lay out a spread, and let your whole team rest and eat together.
title: The Picnic
description: A cozy meadow clearing made for a shared meal. Lay out a spread and your whole party gains Candy and affection, or simply move along.
query: Will you set out a picnic?

1.label: Lay out a spread
1.tooltip:
(+) Candy for each party member's species
(+) Affection across the whole party
1.selected: You unpack a generous spread and your team gathers round to share it...

2.label: Move on
2.selected: You take in the meadow for a moment, then move along.

shared: Your whole team shares the meal - everyone gains Candy and grows a little closer!
